scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist')){console.error('dist/ missing — run pnpm build first');process.exit(1)};if(!fs.existsSync('templates/ssr')){console.error('templates/ssr missing');process.exit(1)};if(!fs.existsSync('templates/spa')){console.error('templates/spa missing');process.exit(1)}"
